queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between critical credit history or other existing credits and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the contribution of the absence of a checking account to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk reduction associated with loan purposes specifically for the purchase of used vehicles.
